<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="发布三道闸" id="cl3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-544" dy="-132" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="trig" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="pnpm release:packages" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="370" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="闸一：build + test 全绿
dependsOn: [build, test]
任一红 → 停" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="360" x="320" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="trig" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="g1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="闸二：版本号唯一性校验
npm view 查重，已存在 → 拒绝

div.div:
闸一：build + test 全绿
dependsOn: [build, test]
任一红 → 停

div.div:
闸二：版本号唯一性校验
npm view 查重，已存在 → 拒绝
防止重复发同一版本

div.div:
闸三：仅 CI 主分支可发布
本地禁止 npm publish
防止手滑发半成品
